steps.title: Router receives request
steps.explanation: The router matches the incoming HTTP request to a handler.

steps.title: Handler validates input
steps.explanation: The login handler parses the request body and validates credentials.

sections.title: Authentication
sections.description: How the auth system validates users

steps.title: Token generation
steps.explanation: After validation, a JWT token is generated and returned.

diagram.mermaid:
flowchart TD
    A[Validate Credentials] --> B[Generate JWT]
    B --> C[Return Token]
